steps.title: Identify the slope
steps.content: In the linear function $t(x)=-4x+68$, the coefficient of $x$ is the slope. Here, the slope is $-4$.

steps.title: Interpret the rate of change
steps.content: The input $x$ is hours after $7$ p.m., and the output is temperature in degrees Fahrenheit. A slope of $-4$ means the estimated temperature changes by $-4$ degrees Fahrenheit each hour.

steps.title: Choose the correct interpretation
steps.content: A change of $-4$ degrees Fahrenheit per hour means the temperature decreases by $4$ degrees Fahrenheit each hour. The answer is A.
